ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "nuts2_code" TEXT /* NUTS2 code for the geographic region */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Process ID associated with the energy consumption */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year ID of the consumption data */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Hour ID of the day for the consumption data */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (residential, commercial, or industrial) */,
  "subprocess" TEXT /* Subprocess within the main process */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., electricity, natural gas, solar) */,
  "load" REAL /* Load measured in the specified unit */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the load (e.g., kW, kWh) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Exact datetime of the consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hours ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_nuts2_code FOREIGN KEY ("nuts2_code") REFERENCES regions ("nuts2_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "nuts2_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuts2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process (e.g., heating_residential) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the process (e.g., heating, cooling, manufacturing) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the process (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the process in terms of energy usage */,
  "average_load" REAL /* Average load for the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "is_peak_hour" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hour is a peak hour */,
  "average_load" REAL /* Average load during this hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "energy_consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy consumption record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_energy_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_consumption_id") REFERENCES energy_consumption ("id")
)
